seoTitle: Reynella East vs Richmond — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Reynella East and Richmond. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Reynella East vs Richmond: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Reynella East and Richmond.
heading: Reynella East vs Richmond — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Reynella East, South Australia and Richmond, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Reynella East has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Richmond (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Reynella East or Richmond safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Reynella East has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Richmond scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Reynella East scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Richmond scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Reynella East or Richmond?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Reynella East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
